title: Slave II
content:

|captains=[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] |crewmembers=[[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]] |registry= |aliases= }} The '''''Slave II''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] owned by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], which he used circa [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. It cost him 225,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. ==Characteristics== [[File:SlaveIIDeckplan-Gamer7.jpg|thumb|left|180px|''Slave II'' deckplan]] ''Slave II'' was a [[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors]] [[Pursuer-class enforcement ship|''Pursuer''-class enforcement ship]], a patrol craft, which was popular with the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] police units since it was tough and good at dealing with [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], as well as having the cargo space for the usual police needs. Once Fett bought the ship, he immediately went about modifying it so it would hold all the "nasty surprises" that victims of his other ship experienced. Two [[Tion Mil/Sci Industries/Legends|Tion Mil/Sci Industries]] [[Mil-StarIV engine]]s propelled the heavy patrol craft, and three [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] x41 maneuvering thrusters were mounted on the port-side stabilizer. Powerful [[Torplex/Legends|Torplex]] military-grade [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] generators provided protection, whereas the ship was armed with twin forward-firing [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]] and an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] turret. There was also a "surprise weapon," consisting of a rearward-firing [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launcher, which held a magazine of six torpedoes. The ship had a sophisticated [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] array system, such as in [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']]. Although it lacked ''Slave I''{{'s}} stealth systems, some might have eventually been installed. There were rumors of five force-field-enclosed prisoner cages on board. Since his prime target's companion was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]], it is not unlikely that the cells had molecularly reinforced walls and gravity restraints. ==History== Years after Boba Fett's escape from [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|Great Pit of Carkoon]], with this new freedom he vowed revenge on [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and so set into motion a plan. Since his original ship, ''Slave I'', was in impound, he obtained a new one. This would also help keep his profile low until he wanted to confront the smuggler.
[[File:SlaveII-HBDE.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Boba Fett standing in front of ''Slave II'']]
Han Solo did encounter Boba Fett in the end, on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta's]] moon [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. Fett explained to a stunned Solo that the Sarlacc had been unable to digest him, creating Fett's means of escape. After a tense escape for Solo, seeing the death of one Hutt who was flipped from his hover platform into the voids of Nar Shaddaa, Fett pursued the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] in his new ship. The ''Falcon'' at this time had been secretly hiding aboard the ''[[Starlight Intruder]]'', a ship owned by [[Salla Zend]]. Fett managed to track the hyperspace vector of the ''Intruder'', which eventually led him to the world of [[Byss/Legends|Byss]]. However, as the ''Falcon'' entered the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] of the planet the [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield]] was activated, causing Fett to collide and rip off his stabilizer bar, disabling his ship. But since Fett's own shields were up, he escaped incineration and went on to continue his pursuit of the smuggler in his original ship. ''Slave II'' was put into drydock, from where it was stolen soon afterward. ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=A Barve Like That: The Tale of Boba Fett|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} *[[Dark Empire 3|''Dark Empire'' 3]] {{1st}} *[[Dark Empire 4|''Dark Empire'' 4]] ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Slave II}} *''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' *{{GalaxyCite|6|Predators of the Empire|reprint=1}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' *''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'' {{Imo}} *{{Topps|set=1996 Topps Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|cardname=''Virago''|link=https://www.rebelscum.com/photo.asp?image=/sote/soteTC085.jpg}} *{{GalaxyCite|9|A Guide to the Vehicles in Shadows of the Empire|A Guide to the Vehicles in ''Shadows of the Empire''}} *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Aurra Sing: Dawn of the Bounty Hunters]]'' *{{GamerCite|7|Harbingers of Doom}} *{{FactFile|55|SLA 3-4|''Slave II''}} *{{FactFile|60|SLA 5-6|''Slave II''}} *{{FactFile|77|FET 27-28|Boba Fett}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|starship|slavei|Slave I}} *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' [[File:SlaveII-cockpit-HBDE.jpg|thumb|250px|Cockpit of Slave II]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{StartBox}} {{SuccessionBox |title=[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] |years=[[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] - c.
